caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Turks and Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing sustained winds near 21 knots with wave heights reaching 6.6 feet and a dominant NNE swell direction at an 8-second period. Rain chances are moderate with a 63 percent probability, while St. Maarten sees lighter winds around 17 knots and less significant sea conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Venice Faces Heavy Rain with Calm Winds and Low Waves
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 100% chance of precipitation today, accompanied by light winds up to 13 knots and wave heights reaching 2.4 feet from the southeast. Naples remains calmer with winds around 9 knots and minimal wave activity, posing no significant marine concerns.
